raw_consumer_statement:
I am submitting this complaint regarding a mishandled billing dispute on my Citibank credit card involving a transaction of {$1600.00} dated XX/XX/year>, for a purchase made through XXXX. 

I initially filed a dispute through XXXX, and XXXX indicated that a refund would be issued. However, I did not receive the refund. As a result, I filed a dispute with Citibank on XX/XX/year>. 

On XX/XX/year>, after speaking with XXXX and learning that they had closed my case because I opened a credit card dispute, I contacted Citibank for guidance. During that call, I was explicitly told by a Citibank representative that I could close my dispute and 100 % reopen it later if XXXX did not issue the refund. 

Relying on this representation, I closed my dispute. 

However, when I later attempted to reopen or continue the dispute, I was informed by multiple Citibank representatives that the case could not be reopened once closed. I was told that their investigators are unable to reinitiate the dispute. 

As a result, I have been left without any resolution : * I have not received the product refund from XXXX * I have not received any credit from Citibank * I relied on incorrect and misleading guidance from a Citibank representative, which directly caused my inability to pursue my dispute Additionally, I was told by a Citibank representative that if the dispute did not resolve in my favor, I would receive a refund of any interest charges related to the transaction. However, when I contacted Citibank on XX/XX/year>, I was told that I must first pay off the full balance and only then seek reimbursement for interest, which contradicts prior guidance. 

Further, I was informed on XX/XX/year>, that my dispute was under review. The Citibank XXXX XXXX has continued to show the matter as open. However, when I called on XX/XX/year>, I was told that the dispute had been closed, with no resolution or notification provided to me.

I made all decisions in good faith based on Citibanks instructions. The incorrect guidance I received directly resulted in my loss of access to dispute protections.

* * Requested Resolution : * * I am requesting that Citibank : 1. Provide a refund or provisional credit if the claim is validated 2. Refund any interest charges associated with this transaction without requiring full balance payoff first I also request that Citibank review the inaccurate and inconsistent guidance provided by its representatives to prevent similar issues for other customers. 

Thank you for your attention to this matter.
